name: Tsuchiya Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Tsuchiya Holdings Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, provides control, management, and consulting services for companies operating in the construction industry in Japan. The company is involved in the construction of homes, as well as remodeling of buildings. It also offers real estate brokerage and leasing services, as well as offers solar power generation equipment. The company was formerly known as Tsuchiya Home Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tsuchiya Holdings Co., Ltd. in November 2008. Tsuchiya Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan.
